TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/236941. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 2010.13 side 1b of tape: Speech about conversion to Christianity and hymn by a man. Recorded 1967 or 1970 in Pingtung Taiwan.
